The focused Line Processing suite passed 70/70 and the aggregate Debug core executable passed 630/630. Renderer membership, all three aliases, exact AutomationIds, every action, clipping, localization retention, re-entry reset, and clipboard states are represented in source and the focused -LineRoutesOnly harness. Final native UI build, executable UI Automation, launch, LowLevel MCP/driver capture, and screenshot disposition remain pending and are not claimed by this attempt.

Final focused evidence is green except visual capture. Native Debug and Release builds each exited 0; both core executables passed 630/630, including Line Processing 70/70. Catalog parity passed all 346 fixed routes plus five dynamic families. The managed dotnet build WinForge.sln -c Debug -p:Platform=x64 check exited 0 with 0 errors and reported 161 existing warnings as a historical, non-contract observation. PrintWindow returned rendered_ok, but inspection found a composition-white invalid frame; the image was deleted and no visual pass is claimed. Full native shell smoke, run-winforge and canonical screenshots, hosted release-per-push proof, and Git integration/remote proof remain pending.

Final local execution evidence is reconciled. Native Debug and Release builds exited 0; both core executables passed 630/630, including Line Processing 70/70; catalog parity passed; the managed solution build exited 0 with 0 errors, with 161 warnings retained only as historical, non-contract output; focused UI Automation passed 42/42; and the full owned shell passed 348/348 with exit 0. attempts.result: Package Manager now parses safe common Details fields from CLI key/value output and JSON above the bounded raw output while dropping secret-like, duplicate, and unknown fields. Debug and Release each passed 265/265 (219 core route/package-manager checks plus 46 parser checks), retaining Package Manager command, parser, runtime, containment, alias, bundle, sort, state, Details-query, update-rule, and snooze assertions; the process-owned UI Automation shell passed 97/97 with native update-rule and custom snooze-duration picker coverage. Native driver capture remained blocked because CopyFromScreen was unavailable and PrintWindow produced a blank/near-uniform WinUI client frame. LowLevel MCP checkout exists locally, but no LowLevel MCP tools are exposed in this Codex session and the local fallback lacks uv/python/mcp dependencies.

Package Manager Operations now persists probe/query events and preview-only install/update/uninstall plans as structured queue entries, imports legacy string history, and exposes run-next/run-last ordering plus retry-preview markers. No package-manager mutation process is executed. Debug and Release native tests remain expected at 265/265, and the process-owned UI Automation shell now covers the preview queue policy and controls at 101/101. Native driver capture for package-operations remained blocked because CopyFromScreen was unavailable and PrintWindow produced a blank/near-uniform WinUI client frame. LowLevel MCP checkout exists locally, but no LowLevel MCP tools are exposed in this Codex session and the local fallback lacks uv/python/mcp dependencies.

Native C++ FilterDiscoverPackageItems now mirrors the managed cached Discover contract: Both, Name, ID, Exact, and Similar modes with case-sensitive/ignore-special-character normalization preserve raw source order and never start another package query. Debug and Release each passed 322/322 (276 core checks plus 46 parser checks), including nine focused filter vectors; the process-owned UI Automation shell passed 144/144, including accessible/unclipped controls, cache-only re-filtering without a query, and language-rerender retention. The required package-discover driver capture and an inspected LowLevel headless HWND capture were blank/near-uniform, so no image was accepted and visual evidence remains capture-blocked.

Native Discover now has source-aware multi-select install previews. PackageSelectionKey canonicalizes manager/source with a delimiter-safe manager/id/source key and omits invalid source text; selection deduplicates cached rows, caps exact argv previews at 25, clears on query/view invalidation, and never runs a package command. Debug and Release each passed 324/324 (278 core + 46 parser); elevated process-owned UI Automation passed 144/144 after the filter smoke was made idempotent against persisted settings. The driver at WaitMs 16000 and the inspected WinForgePackageBatchPreviewAudit LowLevel HWND capture were blank/near-uniform, so visual evidence remains capture-blocked.

Native Package Manager now has source- and action-aware cached multi-select previews in Discover, Updates, and Installed. PackageSelectionKey canonicalizes a delimiter-safe manager/action/id/source key and omits invalid source text; selection de-duplicates only inside its matching cached view, clears on query/view invalidation, caps exact validated Install/Update/Uninstall argv plans at 25, writes them to Operations, and never runs a package command. Debug and Release each passed 325/325 (279 core + 46 parser); catalog parity passed 346 fixed routes, 5 dynamic families, 319 registry records, 22 categories, and 346 ledger rows; elevated process-owned UI Automation passed 144/144. The required drivers at WaitMs 16000 and the inspected WinForgePackageBatchActionAudit LowLevel headless HWND captures for package-discover, package-updates, and package-installed were blank/near-uniform, so visual evidence remains capture-blocked and no image was accepted.

Native Bundle workspace partial behavior slice implemented without a mutation path. Checked cached Discover and Installed rows append inert manager/source/ID/version metadata; the bounded workspace imports UniGetUI v3-style JSON/.ubundle with export_version 3, atomically exports a non-empty workspace, de-duplicates by manager/source/ID/version, keeps compatible packages separate from explicitly incompatible audit records, strips installation-option/update metadata on import, confirms dirty replacement, and never builds an argv plan or runs a package command. Debug and Release each passed 326/326 (280 core + 46 parser); catalog parity passed 346 fixed routes, 5 dynamic families, 319 registry records, 22 categories, and 346 ledger rows; elevated process-owned UI Automation passed 146/146, including an explicit empty Bundle workspace, disabled-empty-export rule, and horizontal-bound checks. File-dialog import/export and atomic-save lifecycle were not driven end-to-end by the shell smoke. The required drivers at WaitMs 16000 and the inspected WinForgeBundleWorkspaceAudit LowLevel headless HWND captures for package-discover, package-installed, and package-bundles were blank/near-uniform, so visual evidence remains capture-blocked and no image was accepted.

Native Package Mutation Coordinator added a deliberately narrow individual action path: review one cached Install/Update/Uninstall row into AwaitingConsent, then separately confirm the exact validated argv for serial normal-integrity execution. The in-memory coordinator caps records at 50, times runtime out after five minutes, supports pre-start/running cancellation and fresh-consent retry, cancels all work on Package Manager exit/navigation, rejects elevation/hooks/unsafe input, custom mutation arguments, and oversized reviewed previews, and stores a redacted reviewed argv plus request/lifecycle metadata in memory. It persists one bounded redacted lifecycle event while withholding third-party stdout/stderr/runtime diagnostics. Multi-select and Update all remain preview-only. Debug and Release each passed 355/355 (309 core + 46 parser), including 29 focused coordinator cases; catalog parity passed 346 fixed routes, 5 dynamic families, 319 registry records, 22 categories, and 346 ledger rows; elevated process-owned shell smoke passed 148/148. A persistent LowLevel HTTP MCP isolated desktop launched package-discover, package-updates, and package-installed, but every inspected current native HWND capture had a title bar plus a blank/near-uniform client frame. The required driver failed the same way, so all changed Package Manager views are capture-blocked and no image was accepted. No normal-integrity live external query or mutation was run because the session is elevated and the runtime failed closed.

Package Discover gained a bounded PCRE2-16 regex mode that filters only existing cached rows. Regex never reaches argv or HTTPS, remote Search is disabled and guarded, Similar/ignore-special are unavailable, Exact is full-match, and NativePackageQueryAudit remains unchanged unless a genuine query begins. Debug and Release each passed 374/374 (328 core + 46 parser); catalog parity passed 346 fixed routes, five dynamic families, 319 registry entries, 22 categories, and 346 ledger rows; elevated process-owned UI Automation passed 164/164 including cache-only/no-query, invalid-regex retention, and horizontal-bound assertions. Driver and LowLevel isolated-desktop captures were blank/near-uniform, so visual evidence remains capture-blocked.

Native Package Manager batch review now accepts selected cached Discover/Updates/Installed rows and the eligible Review Update all set as one all-or-nothing batch of at most 25 complete redacted argv plans. A single later batch confirmation queues the retained children serially; cancellation stops active/pending work together; retry returns only failed, timed-out, or cancelled children to fresh consent and never replays success. Invalid children, duplicate identities, elevation, hooks, unsafe IDs, custom mutation arguments, oversized previews, and unavailable capacity reject the entire batch without retaining a prefix; capacity cleanup preserves every child of a still-active batch. Debug and Release each passed 387/387 (341 core + 46 parser), including 42/42 focused coordinator checks; catalog parity passed 346 fixed routes, five dynamic families, 319 registry entries, 22 categories, and 346 ledger rows; elevated process-owned UI Automation passed 166/166 with static batch-policy and horizontal-bound assertions. No live external mutation ran because this elevated session fails closed. The required driver rejected package-discover, package-updates, package-installed, and package-operations at WaitMs 16000 because CopyFromScreen was unavailable and PrintWindow was blank/near-uniform. LowLevel MCP separately launched all four routes on an isolated desktop and captured their resolved 1980x1320 HWNDs; inspected full-window and client-only PNGs were blank, so visual evidence remains capture-blocked.

Native Package Setup now has a fixed review-only descriptor registry: all 11 manager rows, seven immutable Winget engine bootstrap IDs (Chocolatey, Python 3.12, Node LTS, .NET SDK 9, PowerShell 7, Rustup, Bun), manual-only Winget/Scoop/PowerShell Gallery/vcpkg, and 14 immutable managed-parity dependency IDs. PackageSetup core accepts only fixed source-default Winget package references, deduplicates the 21 reviewable descriptors to 18 exact packages, and reuses the validated argv planner. UI review remains inert; a distinct Operations confirmation is mandatory before normal-integrity serial work, while remote scripts, arbitrary commands, custom arguments, hooks, unsafe/local sources, and elevation fail closed. A fresh 852x880 full-window and 836x841 client-only LowLevel Setup capture were inspected blank and discarded, so visual evidence remains capture-blocked.

The full bounded PCRE2-16 builder now validates before applying a Package Discover target, deterministically switches to Discover, retains only an actual completed Discover-search cache, and clears stale Updates/Installed rows. Regex remains local-only: it cannot enter argv or HTTPS, primary remote Search is disabled, and NativePackageQueryAudit remains unchanged. routes.expected: Word Frequency · 詞頻統計 is implemented natively in C++, reachable through every registered alias, and behaviorally equivalent to the current WinForge feature.

attempts.result: Dedicated C++/WinRT Word Frequency is backed by standard-C++ TextAnalysis and preserves word, bigram, and Unicode-scalar modes, managed options and stop-word behavior, current-culture ordering, exact count/bar/percentage rows, and managed-compatible CSV output. Native Debug and Release builds each exited 0; both core executables passed 714/714 including Text Analysis 84/84; managed StructuredTextTools.Tests passed 7/7; catalog parity covered 346 fixed routes plus five dynamic families; the managed Debug x64 solution build exited 0 with 0 errors; and focused -TextAnalysisRoutesOnly UI Automation passed 40/40 across seven aliases, including wordfreq and module.wordfreq. The default-safe focused run did not mutate the clipboard; Copy remains an explicit-only opt-in action.

Final exhaustive native shell passed 388/388 (388 passed, 0 failed) on final source after the Text Diff height assertion was made DPI-aware; the focused utility rerun passed 39/39. Visual capture evidence is recorded in the following attempt.

LowLevel Computer Use MCP 1.28.1 created winforge-wordfreq-capture, launched wordfreq as PID 20180, and resolved WinUIDesktopWin32WindowClass HWND 49087750 at 1980x1320. Full 1980x1320 and client-only 1958x1264 screenshots reported rendered_ok=true, but original inspection showed frame-only white content and pixel audit found the client was exactly one RGB color (255,255,255). The repository driver independently ran wordfreq with -Native -WaitMs 16000 and exited 1: CopyFromScreen is unavailable and the PrintWindow fallback produced a blank or near-uniform WinUI client frame; graphics capture is unavailable in this desktop session. Both invalid MCP PNGs were removed, the driver retained no invalid file, PID 20180 was force-terminated, the named desktop closed successfully, no WinForge process remained, and no canonical screenshot changed.

Post-c6 Word Frequency evidence: CurrentCultureIgnoreCase now uses .NET Runtime width/kana tailoring, stable canonical-equivalent ordering, and a shared initialized collator without comparator serialization; fullwidth case folds while width/kana remain significant. The named total stays queryable without a per-edit polite live announcement, with attribution in THIRD-PARTY-NOTICES.txt. Native Debug and Release core each passed 717/717 including Text Analysis 87/87; focused UIA passed 40/40; the full native shell passed 388/388; and catalog parity covered 346+5. The repo-local LowLevel checkout was present but its tools were not callable in this session. The fresh driver retry rejected a blank/near-uniform PrintWindow fallback and retained no PNG.

routes.notes: 2026-07-19 · IN PROGRESS / 進行中. c6 aligns CurrentCultureIgnoreCase with .NET width/kana tailoring, canonical-equivalent stable ordering, and a shared collator; named total stays queryable without per-edit polite live announcements. Debug/Release core 717/717, Text Analysis 87/87, focused UIA 40/40, full shell 388/388, catalog parity 346+5, exact CSV, safe local behavior, and explicit-only clipboard policy are green. The fresh driver retry was capture-blocked; LowLevel tools were unavailable in this session and no PNG was retained.
